ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied promotion */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied bundle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_bundle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bundle_id") REFERENCES bundles ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied promotion */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied bundle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_bundle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bundle_id") REFERENCES bundles ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the customer record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is digital */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the image */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the shipment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the return */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the payment method */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the promotion */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bundle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the bundle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bundle */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the bundle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bundle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bundle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundle_items" (
  "bundle_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle item */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bundle that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the bundle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the bundle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bundle item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the bundle item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bundle item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bundle item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_items_bundle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bundle_id") REFERENCES bundles ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
